_comment: Registry of RAG reranker models. These files live in models/ but are NOT chat models -- they are excluded from the chat-model dropdown by discover_chat_models() in config.py. The 'reason' field is shown to the user in the UI when a reranker appears as a non-selectable entry in the model list.

items.reason: RAG reranker (registered in config/rerankers.json) — Ayre uses this internally to rank search results. It is not a chat model. To use it as a primary model, remove it from rerankers.json.
